rationale: Gemini-3-flash-preview provided a more natural and professional Italian translation. It correctly handled technical terms like 'footgun' and 'agentic' (translated as 'automazione agente') with better flow than the DeepSeek candidate. DeepSeek had a duplicated H2 heading ('Lo standard pratico') at the end of the file, which violated the constraint to preserve heading counts. Gemini also correctly updated asset paths to start with '../' as required.
